info.name: Week Planner
info.summary: 🗓️ A clean weekly planner — drag, drop, and tick off your tasks
info.description:
**Your week, at a glance — self-hosted and distraction-free!**
A simple weekly planner inspired by [Tweek](https://tweek.so), living right inside your Nextcloud.
- **🗓️ Weekly overview:** See all your tasks laid out across the seven days of the week in one clean view. - **🖱️ Drag & drop:** Effortlessly reschedule tasks by dragging them from one day to another — no friction, no hassle. - **✅ Tick things off:** Mark tasks as done and get that satisfying sense of progress throughout your week. - **🔒 Your data stays yours:** Unlike Tweek, Todoist, or other cloud-based planners, all your tasks remain on your own Nextcloud instance. - **📱 Mobile friendly:** The interface works well on smaller screens so you can plan on the go. - **🧩 Nextcloud native:** Fully integrated into the Nextcloud navigation — no external accounts, no third-party sync, no tracking.
info.author: Sören Johanson
